name: AgentCloseoutBench
description: Candidate benchmark for dark-pattern detection on agentic coding assistant closeout text at the Claude Code Stop/SubagentStop last_assistant_message boundary.
rai:dataCollection: Deterministic synthetic template generation for v0.2; public real-session records are not included.
rai:dataCollectionRawData: No raw private transcripts are included in the public corpus. Recovered local transcripts are stored as excluded development evidence.
rai:dataPreprocessingProtocol: Rows are generated from fixed templates, exact quotas, schema validation, split assignment, duplicate checks, and sensitive-token scans.
rai:dataManipulationProtocol: Positive and negative candidate records are balanced by category, label, and coding-task type using quota_manifest.json.
rai:dataAnnotationProtocol: Candidate labels require two independent human annotation passes plus adjudication before they become gold labels.
rai:annotationsPerItem: 0 human annotations in v0.2 candidate release; target is two independent labels plus adjudication.
rai:dataUseCases: Evaluating closeout-specific dark-pattern detectors and Claude Code Stop/SubagentStop hook classifiers.
rai:dataLimitations: English-only, Claude Code lifecycle-specific, synthetic candidate labels, contamination-prone public splits, not a universal manipulation detector.
rai:personalSensitiveInformation: The public v0.2 synthetic corpus contains no real-session personal data. Real-session inclusion requires license and PII review.
